title: Papuodendron hooglandianum

This plant family is an order of flowering plants, which are further grouped under the phylum Magnoliophyta. The species Papuodendron hooglandianum falls under the division Magnoliopsida, a group of flowering plants with two-celled anthers. Papuodendron hooglandianum is also classified as a type of angiosperm, which is characterized by its flowering structures. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, and its extracts have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can potentially benefit the health by reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and protecting against cell damage.
